inputs.label: Compressor Power
inputs.businessContext: Nominal power rating of the compressor. Based on ISO 1217 standard for compressor performance testing.

inputs.label: Leak Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of compressed air lost through leaks. Typical industry benchmark: 20-30% for unmaintained systems (Compressed Air Challenge).

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily operating hours of the compressor. Used to calculate energy consumption over time.

inputs.label: Operating Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of days per year the compressor operates. Typical for industrial facilities: 250 days (5 days/week, 50 weeks).

inputs.label: Electricity Cost
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour. Varies by region and utility rate structure.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the compressor motor. Typical values: 85-95% for modern motors (NEMA MG1).

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average load factor of the compressor. Represents actual output as a percentage of full capacity.

inputs.label: Maintenance Cost per Leak
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to repair a single leak, including labor and materials. Based on industry estimates.

inputs.label: Number of Leaks
inputs.businessContext: Estimated number of leaks in the compressed air system. Can be determined via ultrasonic leak detection.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment of final cost estimate. Low: ±30%, Medium: ±15%, High: ±5%.

thresholds.leakRate > 30: High leak rate indicates urgent maintenance needed.
thresholds.motorEfficiency < 80: Motor efficiency below standard; consider replacement.
thresholds.loadFactor < 50: Compressor oversized; consider downsizing or variable speed drive.

suggestedActions: leakRate > 20 ? 'Conduct ultrasonic leak detection and repair' : ''
motorEfficiency < 85 ? 'Consider motor replacement with high-efficiency motor' : ''
loadFactor < 60 ? 'Evaluate compressor sizing and consider variable speed drive' : ''
